params.name: Vedas
params.description:
On Mar 25, 1584 BC, the orally transmitted Vedas were written for the first time.
The Vedas, meaning knowledge in Sanskrit, is one of the oldest texts in ancient India. Legend has it that the knowledge was first passed on to Brahma by Krishna and then spread among mortals by Vishnu. As a result, the Vedas are considered direct inspiration from the gods, without any mixing of mortal thoughts, making it the most fundamental scripture of Brahminism and Hinduism. The Vedas recorded various hymns, …
